meaning: n.(科学幻想小说中宇宙飞船上的)超光速推进装置 超光速推进(状态)
examples: The ship has a class two hyperdrive.
The Attachment System. This is friendship on hyperdrive.
The Millennium Falcon has an extremely fast hyperdrive, rated at class 0.5.
Although pricing details weren't readily available, the HyperDrive SPACE should hit webstores within the month.
The amyloid theory holds that these mutations cause the genes to go into hyperdrive and produce too much amyloid.
